description: The date the event expires (RFC3339 format).
name: sigsci-get-event-by-id

outputs.description: The unique ID of the event. SigSciences.Corp.Site.Event.Timestamp The timestamp of the event (RFC3339 format).
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.Event.ID

outputs.description: Source information, for example, “IP”. SigSciences.Corp.Site.Event.RemoteCountryCode The country code.
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.Event.Source

outputs.description: The remote hostname. SigSciences.Corp.Site.Event.UserAgents An array of user agents.
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.Event.RemoteHostname

outputs.description: If “flagged”, the IP address is flagged and subsequent malicious requests will be blocked. If “info”, the IP address is flagged and subsequent requests will be logged. SigSciences.Corp.Site.Event.Reasons The reason the event was triggered.
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.Event.Action

outputs.description: The total number of requests. SigSciences.Corp.Site.Event.TagCount The total number of tags.
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.Event.RequestCount

outputs.description: The time window (in seconds) when the items were detected. SigSciences.Corp.Site.Event.DateExpires
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.Event.Window
